title: Ancient Moss
description: Overhaul lush caves and turning them into ancient caves
body:
🍀 This Resource Pack overhaul _lush caves_ and turning them into **ancient mossy caves** [_inspired by sniffer texture_]

![MossSsSsSss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d7423480a52b91409fe6a926c38236aba2b03e.png)
# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 new moss blocks textures
# 

🌱 The ancient, **mossy caves** have been languishing underground since the days when _Sniffers_ lived in the world. The _violence_ of nature in these places is surprising.
